beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The temple interior is cooler than the street. Stone altar ahead, lamplight along the nave. A figure in vestments stands at the dais without looking up.

beats.speaker: 0005_WTCH
beats.text: I know what you were sent here for. I also know who sent you. The question is whether you know what you are actually carrying.

opening_beats.speaker: 0008_PRST
opening_beats.text: Hypatia's apprentice. I was informed. The lottery is useful that way — it delivers the right person at the right moment, if you know what you are asking for.

opening_beats.speaker: 0008_PRST
opening_beats.text: I have a task for you. It requires discretion and a willingness to travel to the forest commune without announcing yourself.

beats.speaker: 0008_PRST
beats.text: Crystals. The witches hold them in the commune — they were gifted to them and I need them returned to the temple for a ritual of completion. Retrieve them quietly. The witches will not be harmed if this is done cleanly.

opening_beats.speaker: 0005_WTCH
opening_beats.text: What you are carrying is not for a ritual. Those crystals were given to us by the Gnomes — handed over at significant cost to people who cannot afford to lose them. They refine into a plasma weapon. Do you understand what that means?

opening_beats.speaker: 0005_WTCH
opening_beats.text: You can take the real crystals back to Saffron and do what you were told. Or you can take the fakes I will give you, and Saffron gets a performance. The crystals go somewhere safer.

beats.speaker: 0005_WTCH
beats.text: Good. I will remember this. So will everyone here. When you need us, come to the commune — not the front path, the one from the east tree line.

responses.text: I was given a task. I'm going to complete it.

beats.speaker: 0005_WTCH
beats.text: Then you are choosing to not know. That is also a choice. You will live with it.

beats.speaker: 0008_PRST
beats.text: The ritual will proceed. You have done well.
